original_image_tags: Yellowed, aged paper with visible two-hole punch marks at the top edge. The majority of the page shows faint, reversed ghosting (bleed-through text) from the obverse side of the document. A strip of adhesive tape or residue runs diagonally across the upper center. At the bottom, several ink stamps are applied upside-down relative to the main document's orientation (rotated 180 degrees).

elements.description: Multiple blue stamped text elements. Visible text includes 'RECEIVED-DIRECTOR FBI NOV 30 1 20 PM 66.', 'NOV 29 5 37 AM 66. REG'D DE LACH FBI', and 'NOV 30 11 42 AM 66. REC'D DE LACH FBI'. A strip of transparent tape is affixed diagonally near the top center.

judge.reason: Description A and B agree on the diagonal tape element but disagree on the nature of the stamped content, with A describing upside-down ink stamps and B providing specific readable text from blue stamps, without direct contradiction on the quoted strings.
